case_title: THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA VS. DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO.

docket_entries.description: SUMMARY JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1305(C)(2), PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES FILED BY REAL PARTY IN INTEREST DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. HEARING SET FOR SEP-17-2009 AT 09:30 AM IN DEPT 301

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF THE PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE CO. $50,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $365.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $50,365.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

LAW AND MOTION 301, REAL PARTY IN INTEREST DANIELSON NATIONAL INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE SUMMARY JUDGMENT, VACATE FORFEITURE AND EXONERATE BAIL BOND PURSUANT TO PENAL CODE SECTION 1305(C)(2) IS GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION HAS BEEN FILED. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR# 8189
MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-17-2009 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
